name: Corn Dogs II
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the egg, milk, and melted fat until well combined.
3. Gradually add the dry mixture to the wet ingredients, stirring until thoroughly mixed.
4. Insert sticks into the weiners to serve.
5. Pour batter into a tall glass for dipping.
6. Deep fry until golden brown at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
